mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is falling over recent months, discount rates and financial conditions ease, lifting equity valuations and supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive in a majority of falling-FEDFUNDS observations, or if the rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A high policy rate above 4.5% tightens discounting and credit conditions, which should pressure equity multiples and lead to negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes produce positive 5-day SPX returns more than 60% of the time, or if the signal's short-horizon Rank IC is not negative in a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in retail sales growth indicates stronger household demand and corporate revenue momentum, which should translate into positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if higher RSAFS levels do not coincide with above-median 20-day SPX returns, or if the rolling 2-year Rank IC remains below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate above 4.0% reflects slowing labor income and rising recession risk, which should depress equity prices and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations deliver positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 55% of cases, or if the signal flips sign in a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Stronger industrial production together with rising payrolls identifies synchronized real activity momentum, which should support cyclical earnings expectations and positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint INDPRO-PAYEMS signal fails to outperform either series alone, or if 60-day forward SPX returns are not positive when both indicators rise together.

mechanism_narrative: A housing-starts drop after a prior elevated level signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and a turning point in growth expectations, which should turn S&P 500 returns negative over the next month.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 10% from its 3-month average
failure_condition: Reject if sharp HOUST declines are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns more often than not, or if the signal has no negative Rank IC over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation is elevated while policy rates remain low, real rates stay suppressed and liquidity conditions stay supportive, which should favor positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-FEDFUNDS combination does not outperform single-series signals, or if higher inflation with low FEDFUNDS is not associated with positive 20-day SPX returns.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in unemployment and payroll stagnation signals deteriorating labor demand and a higher probability of earnings downgrades, which should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the combined UNRATE-PAYEMS signal does not predict negative 60-day SPX returns, or if its rolling 3-year Rank IC is not below zero.
